Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative Rules Strict 1 Must follow sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case 2 Specific ordering constraints Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If rejected Do NOT finalize documentation before closing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Recommended but not strict Credit Check within 24 hours of application Inform applicant within 48 hours of loan decision Follow up Call before closing encouraged

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I will develop comprehensive recommendations for improving the loan process The key is addressing timing and procedural gaps while maintaining strict compliance with existing rules Strategic improvements could involve proactive scheduling automated tracking and enhanced communication protocols to streamline the loan application experience
